content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for records where the tour starts with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09C_temp` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`; else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` for a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` for a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09C_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09C_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all the customers.

14. Export the final data excluding `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09C` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send the CSV file `J09C` to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09C_temp` for records where the tour starts with `J09C`.

2. Add column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `J09C_temp`.

3. Classify meter reading type in `J09C_temp` using these rules:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA` when a `HAUS` has less than 3 `EQUNR`; else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with address area `Wiblingwerde` or `Breckerfeld` to `EVU`.

4. Join `J09C_temp` with `EABLG` using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `NET_MASTER` and `SALES_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the `SALES_MASTER` customer table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the `NET_MASTER` customer table entries.

8. Identify households with mandatory meter reading:
   - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `MANDATORY_READING` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` for a record created in `2024` and also `ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP"` for a record created in `2023`.

9. Export all `MANDATORY_READING` entries as CSV file `J09C_MANDATORY_READING` with columns:
   `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

10. Send `J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv` to the internal team:
    - email_address: `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
    - file_path: `<file path for J09C_MANDATORY_READING.csv here>`

11. Identify trustworthy households for meter reading self-report:
    - Set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `DIRECT_MAIL` for every `EQUNR` in `EABL` where `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2024` and `ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP"` in `2023`.

12. Export all `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09C_DIRECT_MAIL` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

13. Send bulk email to all `DIRECT_MAIL` households by uploading the file to the `send_bulk_mail` service for sending direct emails to all the customers.

14. Export the final data excluding `MANDATORY_READING` and `DIRECT_MAIL` entries as CSV file `J09C` with columns:
    `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.

15. Send the CSV file `J09C` to EVU by email:
    - Email address: `meter.readings@evu.com`
    - file_path: `<path_to_exported_csv_file>`

16. Delete the temporary table.

{"success":true,"schema":"# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
TOUR (TEXT) Tour/route identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code
AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description
TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code
TARIFTYP_TEXT (TEXT) Tariff type description
BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'; ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM J09C_temp;

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld') OR CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT e1.EQUNR FROM eabl e1 JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT DISTINCT e1.EQUNR FROM eabl e1 JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on",1,4) = '2024' AND substr(e2."Record created on",1,4) = '2023') AND ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING'

args.sql_query: SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", t.HAUS, t.ANLAGE, t.ME_MA_ID, t.EQUNR, t.HOUSE_NUM1, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.TITLE,''), nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.FORENAME,''), nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.SURNAME,''), nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREET,''), nm.STREET) AS STREET, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.STREETNO,''), nm.STREETNO) AS STREETNO, COALESCE(sm.POST_CODE1, nm.POST_CODE1) AS POST_CODE1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY1,''), nm.CITY1) AS CITY1, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.CITY2,''), nm.CITY2) AS CITY2, COALESCE(NULLIF(sm.EMAIL,''), nm.EMAIL) AS EMAIL FROM J09C_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg ON t.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR WHERE t.ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')
